results.rendered_html:
aiṣṭika a. (kī f.) [iṣṭi-ṭhak]
1 Sacrificial, ceremonial.
2 Treating of iṣṭi or sacrifice (as a work).
Comp.
— pūrtika a. belonging to iṣṭāpūrta (belonging to sacrifices or charitable works).
